paragraphs.cn: 脱钩。马克·卡尼今年早些时候在布鲁塞尔的演讲，他大致为这些西方国家描绘了一条可能不再与美国紧密结盟的前进道路。此外，我认为F-35问题非常有趣，不仅因为与以色列的关系，就像我们讨论过的，内塔尼亚胡不希望这些隐形技术流向土耳其，而且国会可能也不喜欢这样。

paragraphs.speaker: Blake
paragraphs.en: Congress could stand in the way if Trump wants to press forward with this. That's a very interesting dynamic in Washington.
paragraphs.cn: 如果特朗普想推进此事，国会可能会阻挠。这是华盛顿一个非常有趣的动态。

paragraphs.speaker: Cornish
paragraphs.en: OK. A lot of questions going into the day. Thank you to your -- to our group chat. Really appreciate you guys being here. Thank you to you for waking up with us. Right now, we are watching the president touchdown interview where he is set to meet with NATO allies to talk about Ukraine, among other things. I'm Audie Cornish. And I want you to stay with us because we've got these headlines next. var CNN = CNN || {};
paragraphs.cn: 好的，今天有很多问题。感谢我们的群聊。非常感谢你们的参与。感谢你们和我们一起早起。现在，我们正在观看总统的停机坪采访，他即将与北约盟友会面，讨论乌克兰等问题。我是奥迪·科尼什。请继续关注我们，因为接下来还有这些头条新闻。

vocabulary.en: to withdraw one's endorsement or backing
vocabulary.excerpt: Key Dems Pull Support from Platner after New Accusations
vocabulary.exampleCn: Setelah tuduhan baru, anggota Demokrat kunci menarik dukungan untuk Plattner

vocabulary.en: to suggest something to see how people react
vocabulary.excerpt: Trump Floats Idea of Nominating Ted Cruz for Future Supreme Court Seat
vocabulary.exampleCn: Trump secara tentatif mengemukakan ide untuk mencalonkan Ted Cruz sebagai hakim Mahkamah Agung di masa depan

vocabulary.en: a claim or assertion that someone has done something illegal or wrong, typically one made without proof
vocabulary.excerpt: new accusations emerged Monday. A woman he dated coming forward saying that he raped her
vocabulary.exampleCn: Tuduhan baru muncul pada hari Senin. Seorang wanita yang pernah berkencan dengannya maju dan mengatakan dia memperkosanya

vocabulary.en: the end; death or ruin
vocabulary.excerpt: But is it curtains for Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner?
vocabulary.exampleCn: Tapi apakah kandidat Senat Maine Graham Plattner sudah tamat?

vocabulary.cn: meninggalkan kapal; keluar (dari organisasi, partai, dll.)
vocabulary.en: to leave a job, organization, or situation suddenly, especially when it is in difficulty
vocabulary.excerpt: The Democrats are jumping ship.
vocabulary.exampleCn: Anggota Demokrat berbondong-bondong keluar.

vocabulary.cn: 不断增加的；日益加剧的
vocabulary.en: increasing, especially in a way that causes concern
vocabulary.excerpt: pressure mounting on Graham Platner after new accusations emerged Monday
vocabulary.exampleCn: 周一新指控出现后，格雷厄姆·普拉特纳面临的压力日益增大

vocabulary.en: to be caused by or originate from
vocabulary.excerpt: This allegation stems from an event about five years ago
vocabulary.exampleCn: 这一指控源于大约五年前的一起事件

vocabulary.en: in a way that is unambiguously explicit and direct
vocabulary.excerpt: Any accusation of non-consensual behavior is categorically false.
vocabulary.exampleCn: 任何关于非自愿行为的指控都是绝对错误的。

vocabulary.en: to revoke, cancel, or repeal (a law, order, or agreement)
vocabulary.excerpt: Others rescinding their endorsement.
vocabulary.exampleCn: 其他人撤销了他们的支持。

vocabulary.en: to save something from loss or destruction
vocabulary.excerpt: Is it too little, too late to salvage the Democrats' chances in Maine?
vocabulary.exampleCn: Sekarang, apakah sudah terlambat dan terlalu sedikit untuk menyelamatkan peluang Partai Demokrat di Maine?

vocabulary.en: a warning sign or indicator of a problem
vocabulary.excerpt: he had a lot of red flags, red flags that I also pointed to
vocabulary.exampleCn: Dia memiliki banyak bendera merah, dan saya sudah menunjukkannya.

vocabulary.cn: Tidak dapat diperbaiki; tidak bisa dipulihkan
vocabulary.en: not able to be saved, improved, or corrected
vocabulary.excerpt: This is beyond red flags, though. This is irredeemable.
vocabulary.exampleCn: Tapi ini sudah melampaui bendera merah. Ini tidak bisa diperbaiki.

vocabulary.en: the highest or climactic point of something, especially as attained after a long time
vocabulary.excerpt: We saw the kind of culmination of all these controversies coming to a head.
vocabulary.exampleCn: Kita melihat semua kontroversi ini mencapai puncaknya.

vocabulary.cn: Menyerah; memutuskan hubungan (berasal dari slang memancing)
vocabulary.en: to abandon a failing venture or relationship
vocabulary.excerpt: they decided that this was the moment that they wanted to cut bait
vocabulary.exampleCn: Mereka memutuskan bahwa ini adalah saat mereka ingin menyerah.

vocabulary.en: to treat something briefly or superficially, often to avoid embarrassment
vocabulary.excerpt: people sort of glossed over the allegations I raised
vocabulary.exampleCn: Orang-orang agak meremehkan tuduhan yang saya ajukan.

vocabulary.cn: Gol bunuh diri; mencetak gol bunuh diri (kiasan untuk tindakan yang merugikan diri sendiri)
vocabulary.en: a goal scored accidentally by a player against their own team; figuratively, an action that backfires on the person who took it
vocabulary.excerpt: And this is an own goal by Democrats.
vocabulary.exampleCn: Ini adalah gol bunuh diri bagi Partai Demokrat.

vocabulary.cn: Pengetahuan yang tidak umum; topik khusus
vocabulary.en: a reference or piece of information that is obscure or not widely known
vocabulary.excerpt: It's a deep cut, Doug.
vocabulary.exampleCn: Ini pengetahuan yang tidak umum, Doug.

vocabulary.en: to force someone into a difficult or defensive position
vocabulary.excerpt: he would corner you, or he would corner somebody else with a lot of weird stuff
vocabulary.exampleCn: Dia akan memojokkanmu, atau memojokkan orang lain dengan banyak hal aneh.

vocabulary.en: able to be believed; convincing
vocabulary.excerpt: Now, this is deemed as credible.
vocabulary.exampleCn: Sekarang, ini dianggap dapat dipercaya.

vocabulary.en: a person who exploits or preys on others, especially sexually
vocabulary.excerpt: I would really call Bernie Sanders to apologize for pushing this kind of predator
vocabulary.exampleCn: Saya benar-benar akan meminta Bernie Sanders meminta maaf karena mempromosikan predator semacam itu

vocabulary.en: a person who advocates or believes in communism; used here as a derogatory label
vocabulary.excerpt: stop pushing these kind of communists
vocabulary.exampleCn: Berhenti mempromosikan komunis semacam itu

vocabulary.en: having a flaw or imperfection; not perfect
vocabulary.excerpt: he has been a flawed candidate, all of those things
vocabulary.exampleCn: Dia selalu menjadi kandidat yang cacat, dan sebagainya

vocabulary.en: to say or do something to remove the doubts or fears of someone
vocabulary.excerpt: he came to Washington and reassured people
vocabulary.exampleCn: Dia datang ke Washington dan meyakinkan orang-orang

vocabulary.en: affected by alcohol or drugs to the point of losing control
vocabulary.excerpt: he was heavily intoxicated
vocabulary.exampleCn: Dia dalam keadaan mabuk berat

sentences.en: A woman he dated coming forward saying that he raped her while he was heavily intoxicated.
sentences.cn: Seorang wanita yang pernah berkencan dengannya maju dan mengklaim bahwa dia memperkosanya dalam keadaan mabuk berat.
sentences.structure: 主句：A woman...coming forward；定语从句：he dated（省略that）；宾语从句：that he raped her；时间状语从句：while he was heavily intoxicated。
sentences.analysis: 现在分词短语'coming forward'作后置定语；'while'引导时间状语从句；'heavily intoxicated'为新闻常用表达，意为'严重醉酒'。

sentences.en: This allegation stems from an event about five years ago, and they are accusations Platner denies.
sentences.cn: 这一指控源于大约五年前的一起事件，而这些是普拉特纳否认的指控。
sentences.structure: 并列句：This allegation stems...and they are accusations；定语从句：Platner denies（省略that）。
sentences.analysis: 动词短语'stems from'意为'源于'；'about five years ago'为约数表达；定语从句省略关系代词。

sentences.en: Any accusation of non-consensual behavior is categorically false.
sentences.cn: 任何关于非自愿行为的指控都绝对是假的。
sentences.structure: 简单句：主语Any accusation...behavior，系表结构is categorically false。
sentences.analysis: 'non-consensual behavior'为法律/新闻术语，意为'非自愿行为'；'categorically'为副词，强调'绝对地、断然地'。

sentences.en: Democratic support all but collapsing.
sentences.cn: 民主党的支持几乎崩溃。
sentences.structure: 独立主格结构：Democratic support + all but collapsing。
sentences.analysis: 'all but'意为'几乎、差不多'；'collapsing'为现在分词，表示主动进行；此句为新闻标题式压缩表达。

sentences.en: Several key leaders have called for him to drop out.
sentences.cn: 几位关键领导人已呼吁他退出。
sentences.structure: 简单句：主语Several key leaders，谓语have called for，宾语him，宾补to drop out。
sentences.analysis: 'call for sb to do sth'意为'呼吁某人做某事'；'drop out'为固定短语，意为'退出（竞选）'。

sentences.en: Is it too little, too late to salvage the Democrats' chances in Maine?
sentences.cn: 现在挽救民主党在缅因州的机会是否太少、太迟了？
sentences.structure: 一般疑问句：Is it too little, too late to salvage...；不定式短语作真正主语。
sentences.analysis: 'too little, too late'为固定习语，意为'太少太迟'；'salvage'意为'挽救、挽回'。

sentences.en: In hindsight, yes, I mean, he had he had a lot of red flags, red flags that I also pointed to.
sentences.cn: 事后看来，是的，我的意思是，他有很多危险信号，我也指出过这些危险信号。
sentences.structure: 主句：he had a lot of red flags；插入语：yes, I mean；定语从句：that I also pointed to。
sentences.analysis: 'in hindsight'意为'事后看来'；'red flags'为比喻，意为'危险信号、警示'；'pointed to'意为'指出'。

sentences.en: This is beyond red flags, though.
sentences.cn: 但这已经超出了危险信号的范畴。
sentences.structure: 简单句：This is beyond red flags；though为副词，表转折。
sentences.analysis: 'beyond'在此意为'超出……范围'；'though'置于句末，表示转折，相当于'however'。

sentences.en: That was actually one of the huge reasons that I didn't come forward and -- and still struggled.
sentences.cn: 那实际上是我没有站出来并且仍然挣扎的巨大原因之一。
sentences.structure: 主句：That was...one of the huge reasons；定语从句：that I didn't come forward and still struggled。
sentences.analysis: 'come forward'意为'站出来（指公开指控）'；'struggled'表示内心挣扎；破折号表示犹豫或强调。

sentences.en: Like, that was a huge moral conflict to -- to feel like --
sentences.cn: 比如，那是一个巨大的道德冲突 -- -- 感觉就像 -- --
sentences.structure: 主句：that was a huge moral conflict；不定式短语to feel like作定语；破折号表示话语中断。
sentences.analysis: 'moral conflict'意为'道德冲突'；破折号表示说话者犹豫或寻找措辞。

sentences.en: I think we -- we saw the kind of culmination of all these controversies coming to a head.
sentences.cn: 我想我们看到了所有这些争议达到顶点的某种结局。
sentences.structure: 主句：I think；宾语从句：we saw the kind of culmination...coming to a head。
sentences.analysis: 'culmination'意为'顶点、高潮'；'coming to a head'为习语，意为'达到紧要关头、白热化'。

sentences.en: And they decided that this was the moment that they wanted to cut bait.
sentences.cn: 他们决定这是他们想要放弃的时刻。
sentences.structure: 主句：they decided；宾语从句：this was the moment；定语从句：that they wanted to cut bait。
sentences.analysis: 'cut bait'为习语，源自钓鱼，意为'放弃、止损'。

sentences.en: I think it's difficult to see how he continues in this race.
sentences.cn: 我认为很难看到他如何继续参加这场竞选。
sentences.structure: 主句：I think；宾语从句：it's difficult to see how he continues in this race。
sentences.analysis: 'it's difficult to see'为常见表达，意为'很难想象/预见'；'continue in this race'意为'继续参加竞选'。

sentences.en: Certainly, when you see a candidate come forward and say, I'm going to reflect on my candidacy, it's very rare for that person to then come back and say, I'm just going to try to stick it out for a little while.
sentences.cn: 当然，当你看到一位候选人站出来说'我将反思我的候选人资格'时，此人随后又回来说'我只是想再坚持一段时间'的情况非常罕见。
sentences.structure: 时间状语从句：when you see...；主句：it's very rare for that person to...；并列谓语：come back and say。
sentences.analysis: 'reflect on'意为'反思'；'stick it out'为习语，意为'坚持到底'；'for a little while'意为'一小段时间'。

sentences.en: It might as well have said, I'm waiting to see if y'all are going to back me on this.
sentences.cn: 它（声明）几乎等于说：我在等着看你们是否会在这件事上支持我。
sentences.structure: 主句：It might as well have said；宾语从句：I'm waiting to see if...。
sentences.analysis: 'might as well have said'意为'几乎等于说'；'y'all'为口语，意为'你们大家'；'back me on this'意为'在这件事上支持我'。

sentences.en: It means I'm buying myself time to get with my advisors and figure out, can I get out gracefully, especially given how quickly.
sentences.cn: 这意味着我在为自己争取时间，与我的顾问们商议并弄清楚：我能否体面地退出，尤其是考虑到事情发展得如此之快。
sentences.structure: 主句：It means；宾语从句：I'm buying myself time to...and figure out；间接疑问句：can I get out gracefully。
sentences.analysis: 'buy oneself time'意为'为自己争取时间'；'get out gracefully'意为'体面地退出'；'given'为介词，意为'考虑到'。

sentences.en: He said, once again, like he told our own Manu Raju the first time, nothing else.
sentences.cn: 他再次说，就像他第一次告诉我们的马努·拉朱那样，没有别的了。
sentences.structure: 主句：He said；插入语：once again；方式状语从句：like he told...；直接引语：nothing else。
sentences.analysis: 'once again'意为'再次'；'like'在此为连词，相当于'as'；'nothing else'为省略句，意为'没有其他（指控）了'。

sentences.en: And she noted that, you know, people sort of glossed over the allegations I raised, because one of the other accusers had Republican connections.
sentences.cn: 她指出，你知道，人们有点忽视了我提出的指控，因为其他指控者之一有共和党背景。
sentences.structure: 主句：she noted；宾语从句：people...glossed over the allegations；定语从句：I raised；原因状语从句：because...。
sentences.analysis: 'gloss over'意为'掩盖、忽视'；'sort of'为口语，意为'有点'；'Republican connections'意为'共和党关系/背景'。

sentences.en: And frankly, this wasn't predictable.
sentences.cn: 坦率地说，这并非不可预测。
sentences.structure: 简单句：this wasn't predictable；frankly为副词作评注性状语。
sentences.analysis: 'frankly'意为'坦率地说'；'predictable'意为'可预测的'，否定形式表示'并非不可预测'，即'是可以预测的'。

sentences.en: It was predicted, and it was predicted by folks like myself who know Graham Platner.
sentences.cn: 它被预测到了，而且是被像我这样了解格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的人预测到的。
sentences.structure: 并列句：It was predicted, and it was predicted by folks...；定语从句：who know Graham Platner。
sentences.analysis: 被动语态'was predicted'；'folks'为口语，意为'人们'；定语从句修饰'folks'。

topics.title: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳性侵指控与民主党危机
topics.content: 缅因州民主党参议员候选人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳（Graham Platner）被前女友指控强奸，多名民主党要员如约翰·费特曼（John Fetterman）要求其退选。普拉特纳否认指控，但表示将'反思最佳前进道路'。此事件暴露民主党在'相信女性'（Believe Women）原则上的双重标准，此前另一指控者因共和党背景被忽视。
topics.keywords: rape allegation · drop out · endorse · reflect on candidacy · own goal

topics.title: 特朗普北约峰会之行
topics.content: 美国总统特朗普即将抵达土耳其参加北约（NATO）峰会，预计将就军费分摊、对俄政策等议题向盟友施压。此前特朗普曾多次批评北约成员国国防开支未达GDP 2%的目标，并威胁减少美国军事支持。此次峰会可能测试跨大西洋关系的韧性。
topics.keywords: NATO summit · Turkey · defense spending · transatlantic relations

topics.title: 新泽西州洪水灾害
topics.content: 美国新泽西州遭遇严重洪水，导致一家超市屋顶坍塌。极端降雨事件频发，引发对基础设施抗灾能力的担忧。当地紧急救援部门已展开行动，暂无人员伤亡报告。
topics.keywords: flooding · roof collapse · supermarket · New Jersey

topics.title: 美国男足世界杯出局
topics.content: 尽管核心球员复出，美国男子国家足球队（USMNT）在世界杯中未能晋级四分之一决赛。评论员批评球队'没有拼搏'（no heart），引发对教练组和球员表现的广泛讨论。

quiz.question: 文中 'curtains' 在 'But is it curtains for Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner?' 中的含义是？
quiz.explanation: curtains 在此为俚语，意为'终结、完蛋'，常用于表示某人或某事即将结束或失败。

quiz.question: 短语 'cut bait' 在 'they decided that this was the moment that they wanted to cut bait' 中的意思是？
quiz.explanation: cut bait 源自钓鱼俚语，意为'放弃、断绝关系'，此处指民主党决定放弃支持普拉特纳。

quiz.question: 单词 'rescind' 在 'Others rescinding their endorsement.' 中的含义是？
quiz.explanation: rescind 意为'撤销、废除'，常用于法律或正式场合，此处指撤回支持。

quiz.question: 根据文章，民主党人为何最终决定撤回对普拉特纳的支持？
options: A. 因为普拉特纳在民调中落后
B. 因为新的强奸指控出现
D. 因为普拉特纳主动退选
quiz.explanation: 文章指出，新指控出现后，民主党关键人物迅速撤回支持，认为这是'cut bait'的时刻。

quiz.question: 约翰·费特曼（John Fetterman）在采访中要求谁道歉？
quiz.explanation: Fetterman berkata: 'Saya benar-benar akan meminta Bernie Sanders untuk meminta maaf karena mendorong predator semacam ini.'

quiz.question: Manakah pernyataan berikut yang benar tentang tuduhan terhadap Platter?
options: A. Semua penuduh adalah anggota Partai Republik
C. Seorang mantan pacar menuduhnya melakukan pemerkosaan
D. Tuduhan terjadi sepuluh tahun lalu
quiz.explanation: Artikel tersebut dengan jelas menyatakan: 'Seorang wanita yang pernah berkencan dengannya maju dan mengatakan bahwa dia memperkosanya', dan kejadian itu terjadi sekitar lima tahun lalu.
